description:
Information regarding live tracking of the fufillment of a contract

This schema is part of the Long Term Support of Beckn Protocol V2.0 API specification and MUST NOT be extended. Any domain-specific extension must use the property of this schema which is of type Attribute.
title: Tracking

refId.description: Tracking reference ID for the tracking session. Could be the Order ID, Fulfillment ID, Fulfillment Stage ID, or any other unique tracking identifier

url.description: Link/handle to off-network tracking UI or endpoint.
